heading: Registration on supplemental register not used to stop importations
label: 1096 Registration on supplemental register not used to stop importations
text: Registration on the supplemental register or under the Act of , shall not be filed in the Department of the Treasury or be used to stop importations.March 19, 1920
notes: References in TextAct of , referred to in text, is , §§ 1–9, , which was generally classified to sections 121 to 128 of this title, and which was repealed insofar as inconsistent with this chapter by , .March 19, 1920act Mar. 19, 1920, ch. 10441 Stat. 533act July 5, 1946, ch. 540, § 46(b)60 Stat. 444
